data.headline: Buy or Sell in the Hill Country
data.body: I'm Maria Santiago, born and raised in Central Texas. Whether you're selling your family home or searching for your next chapter, I bring local expertise and genuine care to every transaction. With over 12 years in the business and 75+ homes sold, I know this market — and I know how to get results.

data.title: How I Help
data.subtitle: Full-service real estate for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Free Home Valuation
items.description: Get a professional market analysis of your home's current value — completely free, no strings attached.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: I'll find homes that fit your budget and lifestyle, schedule tours, and negotiate the best deal on your behalf.

items.title: Listing & Marketing
items.description: Professional photos, MLS listing, social media exposure, open houses, and targeted digital ads to attract serious buyers.

items.title: Relocation Support
items.description: Moving to Central Texas? I'll help you find the right neighborhood, schools, and community for your family.

items.title: Bilingual Service
items.description: Fluent in English and Spanish — every client gets clear communication and personal attention in their preferred language.

data.title: Getting Started Is Easy
data.subtitle: Three steps to your next move.

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: Fill out the form below or give me a call. I respond within the hour.

steps.title: Get Your Plan
steps.description: Selling? I'll send you a free Home Value Report. Buying? I'll learn about your needs and start searching.

steps.title: Make Your Move
steps.description: Buy or sell with confidence — I'll be with you every step, from first showing to closing day.

data.title: Homes Sold by Maria
data.subtitle: Helping families find their place in Central Texas.

data.title: What Clients Say
data.subtitle: Real reviews from families I've helped.

items.text: Maria made selling our home so easy. She handled everything and kept us informed the whole time. We got multiple offers in the first weekend!
We were first-time buyers and Maria walked us through every step. She found us the perfect home in Round Rock and negotiated $15K off the asking price.
Maria helped my parents sell their home of 30 years. She was patient, respectful, and got them a great price. We couldn't have asked for a better experience.

data.title: What's Your Home Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation home value report.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll send you a personalized market analysis based on recent sales in your neighborhood. **100% free, no obligation.**

data.title: Meet Maria
bio: I'm Maria Santiago — a lifelong Central Texan, proud mom, and your neighbor. I've been helping families buy and sell homes in the Austin area for over 12 years, with 75+ successful transactions under my belt.

I believe real estate is about people, not just properties. Every client gets my personal attention, honest advice, and the kind of service I'd want for my own family. Whether you're buying your first home or downsizing after the kids move out, I'm here to help.
When I'm not showing homes, you'll find me at my kids' baseball games, volunteering at our church, or exploring new restaurants on South Congress.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Home Value Report Is On Its Way!
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
